design_rev2_note: Rev 2 (obs 923): all council findings applied (A1-A4, S1-S5, T1-T3). architecture_impact MODIFYING strengthened — Directive op union + DryRunVerb + AuthoringVerb grow together (7th member each; verbFor/primaryPath exhaustiveness forces it). AuthoringVerb 6→7 +copyIn (collision attributes verb copyIn; pre-emit source-* keep verb undefined; scaffold NOT a verb member). Migration enumerates 2 static + 7 temp-dir run sites. Vehicle copyIn adds collision machinery (had none). kind OPTIONAL: create→rendered, copyIn→copied, absent for 5 non-materializing verbs. Bare defineFactory(fn)+package-read → invalid-input (never cwd). FIT-01 fact-checked: transitive walk bans bare non-builtin specifiers, node:fs via scaffold compliant. ENOENT oracle closed (ancestor-realpath-in-ceiling precondition). Seam anchor pinned (from = packageDir-relative; engine resolves against re-derived packageDir). PRC-09 on final computed destination. lstat-only walk + case-fold posture. 3 engine seam rows = ARCHIVE-GATED deliverable owner=engine-repo. copyIn(): void w/ rationale. Docs rows: dryRun JSDoc, per-export JSDoc checklist, README (+missing copy verb + scaffold section). ADRs 0043/0045/0046 updated, 0025 amendment relabeled. Open questions: none. NEXT: steward foresight → slice → plan-verify.
council_design_note: Blind council on rev 1: needs-rev2 unanimous. BLOCKING×3: [arch] AuthoringVerb must extend to 7 (+copyIn) — verbFor/primaryPath exhaustive switches won't compile, design line 106 claimed opposite, ADR-0043 self-contradicted; [sec] existence oracle reborn via ancestor-symlink+ENOENT (lexical ceiling gate passes, realpath ENOENT→source-not-found differentiates) — fix: ENOENT classifies not-found only after realpath'd parent proven in-ceiling; [tw] AEC-11 'copy failed:' prefix misattributes scaffold/create failures + collides with real copy verb → neutral 'source file...' templates. Should-fix: migration underestimated (temp-dir defineFactory suites need collection.json seeding: canary-no-echo, run-boundary-validation, reserved-lifecycle-names, harness-opted-in/in-memory), vehicle copyIn needs NEW dest-collision branch (parity), seam anchor pin (from relative to packageDir; engine resolves against packageDir not ceiling), PRC-09 guard on post-rename final destination, lstat non-descent + case-fold posture, seam rows archive-gated w/ engine-repo owner, copyIn void rationale, dryRun JSDoc drift, per-export JSDoc checklist, README row. OWNER 2026-07-12: micro-unfreeze V2→V3 approved (AEC-11 reword, BRC-06/ATH-15.2 how-leak removal, oracle scenario, copyIn-void scenario) + DryRunEntry kind labels = rendered|copied. Architect verified ADR-0043's 3 rejection grounds all TRUE (wire decision solid); REQ-05 no-new-mechanism claim verified TRUE against contract-fake two-phase semantics.

explore_note: DEEP explore complete (skill + 4 blind personas: architect, qa, ba, security). ready_for_proposal YES. Convergences: (1) wire shape — architect+security recommend EXTEND copy with source discriminator {kind: package|tree} (no 7th DryRunVerb, ADR-0019 anticipated additive widening, ONE engine apply pass, explicit trust domain); explore-skill dissented (new op) — routed to owner/design. (2) Anchors DIVERGE: resolution anchor (factory dir/packageDir) ≠ containment ceiling (collection.json root) — ruling 2+10 'one root' under-specified; SECURITY HALT-WORTHY: root must be FIXED by trusted run-context, NEVER re-walked from source (planted-collection.json attack); destination containment (write side, post-render) missing from ruling 10. (3) Split A/B RESOLVED: single change, both halves — BA: A-alone breaks motivating case + emit-only parity argument; QA: adversarial classification suite mandatory in A anyway; architect: classifier is the clean seam, A-first as slice order. ADR count consolidated to 4 (under tripwire). (4) Emit-only evidence boundary wording drafted by QA — spec must pin. (5) Batch cap: serialized-batch (JSON-escaped) size, not raw; per-file fit ≠ envelope — design must-close, resolution stays emit-boundary (ADR-0018). (6) REQ-ATH-11 carve-out must widen (harness spies would flag scaffold reads). (7) AuthoringReason union extension = MAJOR, coordinated. (8) ADR-0008 NOT violated (textual evidence; PM overruled). (9) classifyContent name taken → classifyTransport-style name. Baseline architecture.md noted stale (stage-5 already merged).

triage_note: Classified L, over-determined: sensitivity floor (new engine-read-from-disk containment surface + public-api contract) + every size axis lands L. Council convergence (blind architect + pm): XL tripwire ARMED at 6-7 ADR candidates — both personas flag XL-in-L-costume risk. PM pushback #1: split into (A) scaffold by-value/text + create({templateFile}) — pure SDK sugar, zero engine dependency — and (B) by-reference binary copy + copyIn + seam contract — disk-blind break, cross-repo, blocked on PC-PROTO-01. Architect: ADR-0008 NOT violated (package-local reads have blessed precedent: context.ts schema reads, REQ-ATH-11) — counters PM's ADR-0008-amendment claim; scaffold must NOT be a DirectiveFactory method (KIT-03 + ADR-0013 purity — expansion layer above the pure factory); per-file 4MiB threshold ≠ batch-envelope cap (real overflow hole under fan-out); classification-by-bytes vs .template-suffix-intent contradiction must close at explore/spec; two root anchors (packageDir vs nearest collection.json) may diverge — explore must reconcile. Both: emit-only trap — binary half unverifiable against real engine until PC-PROTO-01; must never archive as 'done' (row-186 shape). PM sequencing: stage-5b (built, unevaluated) must evaluate before any new BUILD on shared surfaces; this change is post-plan L1-readiness, does not block stage-6.
